description_text: YoRise Rear Bumper Lip Splitter Canard Black 2PCS Features 【Quality Material】: This car spoiler canard kit is meticulously crafted from high-toughness ABS material, featuring excellent corrosion resistance, weather resistance, and rust prevention. It is less likely to break or fade during use and can maintain stable performance in various harsh environments. 【Function】: This car rear bumper protector is specially designed to protect the rear bumper. It can effectively prevent accidental scratches during reversing and parking from damaging the paint surface. Its streamlined shape can also effectively reduce wind resistance, making the driving process smoother. 【Easy to Install】: The installation of the car rear bumper diffuser spoiler is simple and convenient. First, wipe the installation position clean. Then, use the included screws to fix the diffuser to the corresponding position on the bumper. Finally, tighten the screws to complete the installation. 【Wide Application & Size】: The size of the automotive side skirt diffuser is 17.13 x 4.72 inches, featuring wide compatibility and capable of meeting the installation requirements of bumpers for various vehicle models such as sedans, trucks, and off-road vehicles. Please confirm the bumper size in advance to ensure it fits well. 【Package Included】: This package includes 2 car rear bumper diffuser spoilers and 6 installation screws, easily adapting to daily car modification scenarios, infusing your beloved car with a fashionable and sporty vibe, and fully showcasing your unique personality and style. Shipping Free & Fast Shipping: We offer free shipping to most of the USA with a normal delivery time of 3-7 days. However, due to the current situation, additional delivery time (up to 3 weeks) may be required for some items. Alternative Carriers: We may use alternative carriers (e.g., USPS, FedEx, UPS) to ensure your package arrives safely and on time. Due to the use of multiple carriers, we are unable to provide a tracking number automatically. Handling Time: Orders are processed and shipped within 1-2 business days of receiving cleared payment. Shipping Restrictions: Shipping to Alaska, Hawaii, Puerto Rico, Guam, and other US territories may incur shipping charges or delivery restrictions. Please contact us before ordering, or your order can be refunded/cancelled. State Restrictions: Certain items may not be shipped to California due to state regulations. Contact for Tracking Updates: If you require tracking updates or have any concerns about the delivery of your order, please feel free to contact us, and we will be happy to assist you. Return Policy 30-Day Hassle-Free Returns: If you are not completely satisfied with your purchase, you can return the item for free within 30 days of receiving it for a full refund or exchange. Easy Return Process: Contact us, and we will provide you with a prepaid return shipping label and detailed instructions. No Restocking Fee: There are no restocking fees for returns. However, the buyer is responsible for return shipping costs if the return is not due to a seller"s error. Refund Processing: Refunds will be processed within 1 business day of receiving the returned item in its original condition. Feedback Your feedback is extremely important to us. We strive to provide the best products and customer service possible. If you are satisfied with your purchase, please take a moment to leave us a positive review. If you have any concerns or issues with your order, please contact us before leaving negative feedback. We are committed to resolving any problems and ensuring your satisfaction. Contact Us If you have any questions or concerns, please feel free to reach out to our customer support team. You can contact us through the eBay messaging system. We are available Monday to Friday, 9:00 am to 5:00 pm EST, and we will do our best to respond to your inquiry within 24 hours. Thank you for supporting our small family business!
